summary: Iteration 35: Undo Delete feature fully tested and working. Both test scenarios passed: (1) Delete with Undo - clicking 'Annuler' within 5s restores the item, (2) Delete without Undo - waiting 5s triggers permanent API deletion with success toast.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/proxy/engin/delete endpoint returns success response
Frontend: Click trash icon (data-testid='asset-delete-btn-0') opens confirmation modal
Frontend: Confirmation modal (data-testid='single-delete-modal') shows asset name
Frontend: Click confirm (data-testid='confirm-single-delete-btn') hides item immediately
Frontend: Count decreases from 500 to 499 after confirm
Frontend: Undo toast (data-testid='undo-toast') appears with asset name and 'Annuler' button
Frontend: Undo toast shows progress bar animation (5s countdown)
Frontend: Click 'Annuler' (data-testid='undo-delete-btn') restores item in grid
Frontend: Count restored from 499 to 500 after clicking Annuler
Frontend: Undo toast disappears after clicking Annuler
Frontend: Wait 5+ seconds without clicking Annuler triggers API delete
Frontend: Success toast (data-testid='delete-toast') appears after 5s with 'supprimé avec succès'
Frontend: Item permanently removed after 5s timeout (API called)
critical_code_review_comments: handleSingleDelete (line 214-249): Correctly implements undo pattern - adds to deletedIds immediately, sets pendingDelete state, schedules API call after 5s timeout
handleUndoDelete (line 251-263): Properly clears timeout, removes from deletedIds, clears pendingDelete state
executeDelete (line 161-176): Async function correctly calls API and returns success/failure
undoTimerRef (line 103): Properly uses useRef to store timeout ID for cleanup
Undo toast UI (lines 767-776): Clean implementation with progress bar animation using CSS keyframes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Undo Delete feature is fully implemented and tested in iteration 35. Key data-testids: undo-toast, undo-delete-btn, delete-toast, single-delete-modal, confirm-single-delete-btn, asset-delete-btn-{i}. The 5-second undo window works correctly - clicking Annuler restores item, waiting 5s triggers permanent API deletion.
